productDisplayName: BIBA Women Printed Olive Green Kurta
description: Composition Green V-neck kurta made of 100% cotton, has three quarter sleeves, high back collar, sequin detailing and panel stitch along the neckline, ethnic floral print and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron Classic patterning on contemporary styles by biba is inspired by traditional Indian print and dye arts that make it a special wardrobe favourite. Timelessly chic, this piece will never go out of style. Wear it with tonal leggings and pumps for ethnic glam or with form fitting denims and flats for a casual do. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
